title: Five Nights at Freddy's Legacy
description: Five Nights at Freddy's Minecraft Fully Playable Map
body:
## **This is the full playable Five Nights at Freddy's Map Experience inside of Minecraft!**
This package includes a full non-offical playable recreation of Five Nights at Freddy's with all 7 nights.

This map has _5 Main Nights_, as well as _The 2 Bonus Nights_ to play!
There are also _12 Achievements and 12 Challenges to try_!

## Map Credits:
- [Clouser](https://www.youtube.com/c/C1OUS3R): Coding/Building/Resources/Sfx
- [NoteBlockMatt](https://www.youtube.com/@NoteBlockMatt): Music/Sfx

![FNAF Minecraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cee3cd0c156b37fa74221d9f4105bd8d1162728.png)
